headline: Johnson Controls' 2026 sustainability report highlights energy efficiency returns in mission-critical industries
summary: Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), a global technology leader in energy efficiency, decarbonization, thermal management and mission-critical performance, today released its 2026 Sustainability Report detailing the company's significant progress toward its sustainability goals and the measurable outcomes it is delivering for customers across mission‑critical industries, including healthcare, advanced manufacturing and higher education.
